title: dennstaedtia cicutaria var. tenera
intro: Dennstaedtia cicutaria var. tenera, also known as the tender Dennstaedtia, is a variety of the Dennstaedtia cicutaria fern, a species of fern native to China and Japan. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dennstaedtia cicutaria var. tenera include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in dried or fresh forms for use in local remedies and treatments.
